raw_procurement_request: Procurement request PC-2026-0002 — single-source consulting engagement with Bright Horizon Consulting LLC (US-FL-99001234) for EUR 487,500. Marked urgent. Beneficial owner disclosed as Vladimir Petrov. Conflict of interest declaration NOT attached. Vendor registered in Florida 14 days ago (2026-06-01). Three flagged issues: (1) shell-company vendor — FL LLC < 30 days old, (2) sanctions-adjacent beneficial owner — name matches OFAC SDN list partial match, (3) missing conflict-of-interest declaration.
